contact.label: Contact
contact.description: Initiate a dialogue regarding architectural deliverables, policy traceability, or systems alignment.

hero.title: Human-Centered Access. Deterministic Compliance.
hero.subtitle: We believe the foundation of public benefits access is built at the business rules layer. Applied Policy Systems translates strict federal statutes into plain-language, low-friction digital infrastructure that protects both the resident and the agency budget.

challenge.label: The Implementation Gap
challenge.title: The Translation Layer.
challenge.text: Public technology failures occur when legislative mandates are lost as they move from written law to operational systems. We mitigate this risk by converting complex regulations into deterministic business rules—engineering everything from core eligibility logic down to the exact document schemas required for accurate evidence triage. This ensures policy intent survives the transition into operational infrastructure.
challenge.solution: We ensure system logic is a verifiable reflection of statutory requirements.

infrastructure.label: System Integrity
infrastructure.title: High-Fidelity Architecture.
infrastructure.text: We architect secure frameworks for government agencies to deliver complex services with precision, protecting agency budgets and the citizen experience.

sandbox.label: Demonstrator 01
sandbox.title: Live Consulting Demonstrator 01: Human-Centered Compliance
sandbox.text: This demonstrator illustrates the balance between administrative rigor and user access. It provides residents with immediate feedback on requirements while ensuring the administration receives data that is 100% compliant with statutory mandates.

manual.label: Demonstrator 02
manual.title: Live Consulting Demonstrator 02: Threat Diagnostic Verification
manual.text: This demonstrator showcases the 'Rules as Code' methodology—transforming dense legislative text into an intuitive, conversational guide that provides administrators with a mathematically provable source of truth.

hero.label: Consultation
hero.title: Technical Intake.
hero.subtitle: Contact our architectural experts for government modernization or technology vendor policy alignment.

ai.title: Architectural Triage
ai.desc: Our specialized consulting assistant triages technical needs and provides immediate architectural insights.

cta.title: Architectural Review
cta.desc: The team is available for formal architectural reviews, statutory mapping workshops, and modernization strategy sessions.

founder.title: Graham O'Neill, Founder & Principal Consultant
founder.intro: Graham O’Neill has over 15 years of experience optimizing complex government systems.
founder.p1: His career focuses on translating legislative mandates into plain-language, deterministic infrastructure. From municipal revenue operations to federal advisory roles, Graham aligns written regulations with operational realities.
founder.p2: Before founding Applied Policy Systems LLC, Graham held senior leadership positions across all levels of government, specializing in the structural evaluation of benefits access and the modernization of tax administration programs.

research.label: Research & Insights
research.title: Service Delivery & Policy Fidelity.
research.text: Our methodology is rooted in data analysis and historical context. We publish frameworks that bridge the gap between legislative intent and administrative reality.

per.title: The 25-Year PER Dataset
per.desc: A longitudinal analysis of Payment Error Rates and strict fiscal compliance tolerances.

trbv.title: TRBV Framework
trbv.desc: Targeted Rule-Based Verification metrics to isolate Business Rules Engine calculation failures.

glassbox.title: The Glass Box Ingestion Framework
glassbox.desc: Transparent data integration models ensuring automated determinations remain fully auditable.

irc7216.title: IRC § 7216 Compliance
irc7216.desc: Architectural blueprints for securing tax return information within primary welfare program eligibility logic.

m1.title: Systems Architecture
m1.desc: Architects 'Rules Engine' prototypes combining Large Language Models and deterministic logic engines to automate public benefits eligibility and secure tax filing.

m2.title: State Executive Leadership
m2.desc: Executed the Predictive Benefits Access Initiative, integrating state IT infrastructure with plain language mandates to prevent procedural drop-offs.

m3.title: Data Integration
m3.desc: Architected data-sharing agreements and integration logic for civic tech prototypes to ensure alignment with state IT security parameters.

m4.title: Policy Translation
m4.desc: Operated as a subject matter expert integrating public benefits and tax administration. Directed national policy initiatives and evaluated IRS quality control.

m5.title: Frontline Verification
m5.desc: Conducted direct client application assistance and utilized this engagement to author standard operating procedures and facilitate systemic quality control across multiple state jurisdictions.

m6.title: Federal Advisory
m6.desc: Serves in a concurrent advisory capacity to Congress and the IRS on electronic tax administration, providing subject matter expertise on federal privacy frameworks.

citizen.label: Citizen Benefit
citizen.desc: Tax credits returned to Philadelphia residents through the 'You Earned It Philly' initiative.

funding.label: Modernization Funding
funding.desc: Federal & Philanthropic funding secured for SNAP Payment Error Rate reduction initiatives.

execution.label: Years of Execution
execution.desc: Career dedicated to optimizing public systems at municipal, state, and federal levels.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem & Strategic Engagements
ecosystem.title: Professional Collaboration History.
ecosystem.desc: Operational expertise and network collaborations of the Principal Consultant.
ecosystem.quote: Applied Policy Systems LLC is built on a foundation of deep professional history. Graham has collaborated with national experts in implementation, evaluation, and design, ensuring our methodology is informed by the civic tech ecosystem.

nava.name: Nava PBC
nava.context: Coordinated technical planning for software and real-time dashboards within state benefit systems, focusing on synthetic data environments and statutory verification.

usdr.name: U.S. Digital Response (USDR)
usdr.context: Managed discovery sprints and root cause analysis to reduce SNAP Payment Error Rates (PER) and mitigate recertification churn.

cfa.name: Code for America
cfa.context: Secured operational partnerships to deploy virtual tax software and collaborated on human-centered design for public benefit notices.

arnold.name: Arnold Ventures
arnold.context: Authored proposals for multi-stakeholder data science initiatives, establishing pathways to address SNAP accuracy through predictive modeling.

rfa.name: Results for America
rfa.context: Oversaw randomized controlled trial evaluations for municipal program performance, aligning initiatives with evidence-based policy standards.

prosperity.name: Prosperity Now
prosperity.context: Served as a national policy liaison to the IRS, FDIC, and CFPB, integrating federal tax programs into local financial infrastructure.

cwf.name: Campaign for Working Families

civilla.name: Civilla
civilla.context: Applied service design research and digital identity patterns to inform system architecture evaluations and human-centered public benefit forms.

hero.label: Core Services
hero.title: Independent Verification & Validation.
hero.subtitle: Applied Policy Systems LLC serves as The Translation Layer, providing Independent Verification & Validation (IV&V) and Subject Matter Expert (SME) advisory to ensure absolute statutory fidelity.

fidelity.title: Statutory Verification & Fidelity
fidelity.desc: Independent verification frameworks that ensure administrative systems remain strictly aligned with the written law.

isolation.title: Jurisdictional Isolation Architecture
isolation.desc: Absolute data sovereignty for complex federal/state hierarchies, ensuring localized operations never compromise the global security baseline.

math.title: Mathematical Policy Verification
math.desc: Formal logic environment allowing policymakers to mathematically prove that system rules match the written law.

certification.title: Statutory Certification Hub
certification.desc: Centralized tracking of legislative changes and federal certification requirements (MES/CMS/FNS).

bias.title: Algorithmic Bias Monitoring
bias.desc: Mandatory oversight ensuring system-generated outcomes remain equitable, transparent, and legally defensible.

risk.title: Financial Integrity & Risk Mitigation
risk.desc: Precision-engineered modules built to manage strict tolerances and protect agencies from federal sanctions.

qc.title: Enterprise Quality Control (QC)
qc.desc: A unified auditing engine ensuring cross-program eligibility reviews (SNAP/Medicaid) remain strictly compliant.

per.title: SNAP PER Mitigation Engine
per.desc: Specialized financial compliance for SNAP, managing strict tolerances to prevent federal overpayment sanctions.

abawd.title: ABAWD Compliance Management
abawd.desc: Automates the complex 3-in-36 month time-limit tracking, reducing procedural friction for caseworkers and citizens.

rbac.title: Precision Access Control (RBAC)
rbac.desc: A granular access matrix coordinating work across applicants, caseworkers, and adjudicators with zero data leakage.

intelligence.title: Operational Intelligence & Automation
intelligence.desc: Deterministic engines and analytics that translate complex statutes into mathematically provable outcomes.

rac.title: Rules Engine (RaC)
rac.desc: A legally grounded Rules Engine translating legislative text into machine-executable logic using a Rules-as-Code methodology.

burden.title: Administrative Burden Analytics
burden.desc: Quantifies the friction placed on citizens and staff, replacing self-reported metrics with provable data.

gateway.title: Financial Data & Tax Gateway

api.title: Interoperability API Gateway
api.desc: Comprehensive integration layer designed to prevent vendor lock-in and connect disparate state/federal systems.

delivery.title: Service Delivery & Human Capital
delivery.desc: Infrastructure designed to eliminate administrative burden and embed training directly into production.

adjudication.title: Administrative Adjudication
adjudication.desc: Legally robust framework for managing fair hearings and appeals with full historical context for judges.

portal.title: Omnichannel Citizen Portal
portal.desc: Mobile-responsive self-service hub diverting traffic from call centers by empowering citizens to manage cases.

academy.title: Workforce Training Academy

enrollment.title: Cross-Enrollment Engine
enrollment.desc: Automatically identifies eligibility overlaps across programs to maximize citizen access to benefits.

sprints.title: Threat Diagnostic Sprints
sprints.desc: Rapid evaluation of existing system logic to identify statutory drift and fiscal risk.

advisory.title: IV&V Procurement Advisory
advisory.desc: Independent oversight and requirements drafting for large-scale modernization tenders.

integration.title: Prime SME Integration

verification.desc: Rigorous logic testing to prove that system behavior matches the statutory parent.

documentTool.label: Demonstrator 01
documentTool.title: Document Upload Tool
